title: Home
seoDescription: Shop EcoSuds organic soaps, bath salts, bath bombs, aroma stones and shower steamers through a mobile-first organic products' store with WhatsApp ordering.

hero.title: Organic self-care for softer everyday rituals.
hero.lead: Explore EcoSuds soaps and self-care treats made for simple routines, giftable moments and quick WhatsApp ordering across Pakistan.

intro.title: Five clear categories, one calm buying path.
intro.description: Browse organic soaps, bath salts, bath bombs, aroma stones and shower steamers without clutter. Add items to cart and send a prepared WhatsApp order when ready.

featuredIntro.title: Fresh soaps, spa soaks and aromatic shower treats.
featuredIntro.description: The catalog is structured for quick scanning with clear prices, category filters, product details and human order confirmation.

mosaicIntro.title: A soft, product-first layout built for mobile shoppers.
mosaicIntro.description: Large banner imagery, category cards, trust cues, product mosaics and bottom quick actions keep the store practical on small screens.
